title: leptactina mannii subsp. mannii
intro: Leptactina mannii subsp. mannii is a plant species in the Rubiaceae family, commonly known as the Leptactina mannii tree. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Leptactina mannii subsp. mannii include the treatment of fever, diarrhea, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential anti-cancer properties. Leptactina mannii subsp. mannii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
